history.text: United Nations trusteeship shaped the transition toward self-government.
the Republic of Palau was established, giving Palau a new political framework.
Compact of Free Association appears in Palau's historical record.

worthSeeing.title: Blue Corner:
worthSeeing.text: One of the world's top scuba diving sites, with drift dives past sharks and mantas.

worthSeeing.title: Jellyfish Lake:
worthSeeing.text: Snorkel among millions of harmless golden jellyfish in a landlocked marine lake.

worthSeeing.title: Rock Islands:
worthSeeing.text: UNESCO-listed mushroom-shaped limestone islands with turquoise lagoons.
